title: Istio ServiceEntry
description: A ServiceEntry enables adding additional entries into Istio's internal service registry so that auto-discovered services in the mesh can access or route to these manually specified services.

hosts.description: The hosts associated with the ServiceEntry. Could be a DNS name with wildcard prefix.

addresses.description: The virtual IP addresses associated with the service.

number.description: A valid non-negative integer port number.

protocol.description: The protocol exposed on the port (HTTP, HTTPS, GRPC, HTTP2, MONGO, TCP, TLS).

targetPort.description: The port number on the endpoint where traffic will be received.

ports.description: The ports associated with the external service.

location.description: Specify whether the service should be considered external to the mesh or part of the mesh.

resolution.description: Service discovery mode for the hosts.

address.description: Address associated with the network endpoint (IPv4 or IPv6, or a Unix domain socket path).

ports.description: Set of ports associated with the endpoint.

labels.description: One or more labels associated with the endpoint.

network.description: Network enables Istio to group endpoints resident in the same L3 domain/network.

locality.description: The locality associated with the endpoint in region/zone/sub-zone format.

weight.description: The load balancing weight associated with the endpoint.

serviceAccount.description: The service account associated with the workload.

endpoints.description: One or more endpoints associated with the service.

labels.description: One or more labels that indicate a specific set of pods/VMs.

workloadSelector.description: Applicable only for MESH_INTERNAL services. Selects workloads to treat as part of this service.

exportTo.description: A list of namespaces to which this ServiceEntry is exported.

subjectAltNames.description: A list of subject alternative names for TLS verification.
